class.name: PlayFabPartyNetwork
class.brief_description: A live PlayFab Party network and its lifecycle owner.
class.description: Returned by [method PlayFabParty.create_and_join_network_async] and [method PlayFabParty.join_network_async]. The owning [PlayFabParty] keeps a strong reference until [method leave_async], [method PlayFabParty.leave_network_async], [method PlayFabPartyPeer.close_with_reason], or shutdown settles. Dropping a GDScript reference does not silently destroy the network. [method get_descriptor] returns an empty string until the finalized base64 [code]PartyNetworkDescriptor[/code] is available; the provisional immediate descriptor from network creation is never exposed.

method.name: get_descriptor
method.description: Returns the finalized base64 network descriptor, or an empty string while the descriptor is still pending.

method.name: get_state
method.description: Returns the current network state. See [enum PlayFabParty.NetworkState].

method.name: get_local_user
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabUser] participating in the network.

method.name: get_local_peer
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabPartyPeer] for the network.

method.name: get_local_chat_control
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabPartyChatControl], if chat is enabled.

method.name: is_host_network
method.description: Returns whether the local participant created the Party network.

method.name: leave_async
method.description: Convenience helper that calls [method PlayFabParty.leave_network_async] for this network.

members.member: Finalized base64 network descriptor (empty while pending).
Whether the local participant created the Party network.

signal.name: state_changed
signal.description: Aggregate signal for network state changes.
